headline: F5 to Report Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
summary: SEATTLE, April 07, 2026--F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV), the global leader in delivering and securing every app and API, announced it will report its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, following the market close. F5 will host a live webcast to discuss its results with investors and analysts beginning at 4:30 p.m. ET on April 28, 2026.
